body_txt: Abandoned buildings are something we automatically learn to ignore, which makes them the perfect cover for someone who doesn't want to draw attention to themselves. Like someone operating a less-than-legal business , an illegal gambling den, or the Masquerade . Which means that that abandoned building off in the distance, might not be so abandoned after all, it's just kept looking that way to keep out the curious. Not usually for fight scenes and gunfights like its close relative Abandoned Warehouse , generally people want to keep this building intact. Doesn't mean there won't be an underground fight club there though.
